tagline: Mobile Wellness and Beauty Experiences for Events, Workplaces, and At-Home Self-Care

hero.headline:
Wellness That Comes Directly
to You
hero.subheadline: Reserved + Polished brings elevated spa experiences to your home, office, or event space across NYC and New Jersey. Licensed professionals, nontoxic products, and single-use tools -- so you can relax without leaving your door.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Spa-Quality Treatments<br class="hidden md:block"> Wherever You Are
services.subtitle: From nail care to custom facials, every service is delivered by licensed professionals using clean, nontoxic products. No salon commute, no waiting rooms -- just elevated wellness on your schedule.

cards.title: Mobile Nail Care
cards.description: Elevated manicures and pedicures delivered to your home, hotel, or office. We use nontoxic polishes, single-use tools, and essential oils for a truly clean wellness experience.

cards.title: In-Home Massage
cards.description: Professional massage therapy designed to restore balance and calm. Licensed therapists bring everything needed, including aromatherapy options, for a rejuvenating session.

cards.title: Custom Facials
cards.description: Personalized facials tailored to your skin's unique needs. Each treatment refreshes, corrects, and restores for radiant, visible results -- all in your own space.

cards.title: Wellness Injections
cards.description: Convenient on-site wellness injections administered by licensed professionals. Health and beauty treatments delivered in the comfort of your home or office.

cards.title: Mobile Spa Events
cards.description: Full-service spa activations for corporate wellness, PR events, bridal showers, and private celebrations. We transform any venue into a curated wellness experience.

cards.title: Wellness Memberships
cards.description: Monthly plans for ongoing self-care with preferred pricing on nail care, massage, and facials. Make wellness automatic and integrated into your routine.

steps.title: Book Your Experience Online
steps.description: Choose your service and preferred time. Our simple online booking takes under two minutes. No phone tag, no waiting -- just pick what feels right.

steps.title: We Come to You
steps.description: A licensed, vetted professional arrives at your home, hotel, or office with everything needed. Single-use tools, nontoxic products, and a calming setup included.

steps.title: Relax and Recharge
steps.description: Enjoy a spa-quality experience without leaving your space. No commute, no parking, no waiting rooms. Just pure, personalized wellness on your terms.

about.label: Why Clients Trust Us
about.headline: Founded on the Belief That Wellness Should Be Effortless
about.description: Rachel Jeanty launched Reserved + Polished in 2017 with a simple mission: make elevated wellness accessible to everyone in New York City and New Jersey. Every therapist and technician is licensed, vetted, and trained to deliver spa-quality results using only nontoxic products and single-use tools. We believe life can be both successful and serene.

features.title: Vetted & Licensed Technicians
features.description: Every professional on our team is thoroughly vetted, licensed, and trained to deliver consistent, high-quality treatments.

features.title: Clean, Nontoxic Standards
features.description: Single-use tools, nontoxic polishes, and essential oils are standard on every visit. No exceptions, no compromises.

features.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: Not happy with your experience? We will make it right. Your comfort and satisfaction are at the center of everything we do.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Hidden Fees.
pricing.subtitle: Choose a single session or save with a membership. Upgrade, pause, or cancel anytime -- no contracts.

guarantee.headline: Our "Serenity" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service, we will send another professional to redo it at no charge. Every experience should leave you feeling restored and cared for -- and we stand behind that promise until it does.

faqs.question: How quickly can I book an appointment?
faqs.answer: Most clients can book within 3-5 days, and we often have same-week availability. For events, we recommend booking at least two weeks in advance to ensure your preferred date and services.

faqs.question: Do I need to provide anything for the service?
faqs.answer: Not a thing. Our professionals arrive with everything needed -- tools, products, linens, and setup. All we need is a comfortable space and access to your location.

faqs.question: Are your professionals licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes, every single one. All therapists and technicians are licensed, vetted, and carry full insurance. We use only nontoxic products and single-use tools for your safety.

faqs.question: Can I book services for a corporate event or party?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We specialize in corporate wellness activations, PR events, bridal showers, bachelor parties, and private celebrations. Contact us for custom event packages.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve all five boroughs of New York City and New Jersey. For events outside our standard service area, reach out and we will do our best to accommodate you.

testimonials.name: Christina
testimonials.text: The facial is so relaxing and my face looks radiant afterwards! Reserved + Polished makes self-care feel effortless and luxurious without ever leaving home.

testimonials.name: Emily B.
testimonials.text: I was not expecting to feel so relaxed and rejuvenated after only 15 minutes. The aromatherapy was a wonderful touch. Our whole team loved the experience.

testimonials.name: Noel
testimonials.text: The mini facials and massages were fantastic, the therapists were very skilled and very attentive. Found them on Instagram and booking online was a breeze.

contact.subtitle: Book your first mobile spa experience today. No commitments, no contracts -- just elevated self-care delivered to your door.
